title: Bug fix: inspector connected relation sections need their own scroll containers
summary: Bug fix: inspector connected relation sections need their own scroll containers. Bounding only the overall inspector still leaves high degree nodes with very long Connected Relations and Memory Code Evidence content. det
body:
Bug fix: inspector connected relation sections need their own scroll containers. Bounding only the overall inspector still leaves high-degree nodes with very long Connected Relations and Memory-Code Evidence content. detailSection should render a .detail-section-list wrapper, and CSS should cap each list with internal overflow so the canvas/layout stays stable while users scroll relation groups independently. Verified by Playwright showing two 260px scroll lists with body/details heights unchanged, plus npm --prefix mcp test.
Verified by: Playwright relation-list layout check; npm --prefix mcp test
